summary: Iteration 67: UI Redesign with react-world-flags SVG library tested. All 11 features verified: 51 country cards with circular SVG flags, 8 verified templates with flag icons and fees, search filtering, visa categories with country flag header, AI verification banner, template verification notice, save button disabled until verified, editable review view, and client portal correctly does NOT show government forms section.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 67 verified UI redesign with react-world-flags. Key findings: 1) Gallery shows 51 country cards with circular SVG flag icons from react-world-flags library (not emoji). 2) ISO_CODES mapping correctly converts country IDs to 2-letter ISO codes. 3) Country cards show name and 'X visa types' count with hover effects. 4) 8 Verified Templates section shows template cards with flag icons and government fees. 5) Search input filters countries by name. 6) Click country -> Visa categories page with country flag in header (rounded-xl container). 7) AI-generated workflows show amber 'AI Generated - Verification Required' banner. 8) Template workflows show blue 'Verified Template' notice. 9) Save button disabled (shows 'Verify to Save') until verification checkbox checked, then enabled (shows 'Save as Product'). 10) Green 'Verified by Admin - Ready to save' banner appears after verification. 11) Client Documents & Steps page does NOT show government forms section - only regular document requirements. 12) Review view is fully editable with product name, description, fees inputs. 13) Fonts: Manrope for headings, IBM Plex Sans for body text.

country_cards_with_svg_flags.details: 51 country cards found with 51 circular SVG flag elements from react-world-flags

flag_circular_icons.details: Flags rendered in rounded-full containers (40x40px) with border-2 border-slate-100

country_card_info.details: Cards show country name and 'X visa types' count with hover:shadow-md hover:-translate-y-0.5 effects

verified_templates_section.details: 8 verified templates with flag icons, step/doc counts, and government fees displayed

search_filtering.details: Search input filters countries - 'Australia' filter shows 1 card

visa_categories_with_flag_header.details: Click country -> Pick visa view with country flag in rounded-xl header container

ai_verification_banner.details: AI-generated workflows show amber warning banner with verification checkbox

template_verification_notice.details: Template workflows show blue 'Verified Template' notice (not amber warning)

save_button_verification_flow.details: Save button disabled ('Verify to Save') before checkbox, enabled ('Save as Product') after

green_verified_banner.details: Green 'Verified by Admin - Ready to save' banner appears after verification

client_no_gov_forms.details: Client Documents & Steps page does NOT show government forms section

editable_review_view.details: Product name, description, and fees are editable in review view

government_forms_in_admin.details: Admin AI Workflow Builder shows 'Official Government Forms' section (10 Canada forms visible)

ui_verification_screenshots.templates_section: 8 templates with flag icons, step/doc counts, government fees

ui_verification_screenshots.template_verified: Green 'Verified by Admin' banner, 'Save as Product' button enabled
ui_verification_screenshots.client_documents_steps: Document Progress 12%, 8 step cards, NO government forms section
